title: Shop Space – Okefia
description: Compact retail shop in the busy Okefia commercial area. High foot traffic location, ideal for a provisions store, phone accessories outlet, or fashion retail. The space is freshly painted and ready to move in.

reviews.name: Kayode F.
reviews.text: Great location for business. I've been operating from here for 2 years and sales have been consistent.

reviews.name: Ngozi E.
reviews.text: The space is well-sized and the landlord is straightforward. Good value.
